context.goal: Apply the predefined 'form2' style to the document title paragraph.
context.cues: ONLYOFFICE PDF/document editor is open on the Home tab with a form document visible; the insertion caret is at the end of the title text 'Estimate of Auto Repairs', and the style gallery is visible in the ribbon.

state_anchor.locator: insertion caret at end of title text 'Estimate of Auto Repairs'

anchors.locator: Home ribbon style gallery item labeled 'form2'

procedure.expect: The title paragraph is formatted with the form2 style: centered bold title inside a wide gray bordered header band near the top of the form.
